Package nonprofitbookkeeping.model.ofx

Class InvestmentTransaction

java.lang.Object
nonprofitbookkeeping.model.ofx.Transaction
nonprofitbookkeeping.model.ofx.InvestmentTransaction
public class InvestmentTransaction extends Transaction
Represents an investment transaction, extending the basic Transaction class. This class is intended to hold details specific to investment activities such as security information, quantity, price, and fees. Note: Currently, all methods in this class are stub implementations.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    InvestmentTransaction(String fitId, String dtPosted, String memo, String transactionName, String transactionType, SecurityNode securityNode, BigDecimal quantity, BigDecimal price, BigDecimal fees)
    Constructs an InvestmentTransaction with the given details.

    Method
    Description
    BigDecimal
    getFees()
    Returns any fees applied to the transaction.

    Returns the price per unit.
    BigDecimal
    getQuantity()
    Returns the quantity of the security transacted.
    SecurityNode
    getSecurityNode()
    Returns the security involved in this transaction.
    BigDecimal
    getTotal()
    Gets the total amount of this investment transaction calculated from quantity, price and fees.
    static BigDecimal
    getTotal(Account account)
    Calculates the total amount of the transaction for a given account by summing the totals of all InvestmentTransaction objects stored in that account's transaction list.

  • Constructor Details

    • InvestmentTransaction

      public InvestmentTransaction(String fitId, String dtPosted, String memo, String transactionName, String transactionType, SecurityNode securityNode, BigDecimal quantity, BigDecimal price, BigDecimal fees)
      Constructs an InvestmentTransaction with the given details.
      Parameters:
      fitId - the financial institution transaction ID
      dtPosted - the posting date in yyyyMMdd format
      memo - a memo describing the transaction
      transactionName - the name of the transaction or security
      transactionType - the type of transaction (e.g. BUY or SELL)
      securityNode - the security involved
      quantity - how many units were transacted
      price - the price per unit
      fees - any fees applied

  • Method Details

    • getSecurityNode

      public SecurityNode getSecurityNode()
      Returns the security involved in this transaction.

    • getQuantity

      public BigDecimal getQuantity()
      Returns the quantity of the security transacted.

    • getPrice

      public BigDecimal getPrice()
      Returns the price per unit.

    • getFees

      public BigDecimal getFees()
      Returns any fees applied to the transaction.

    • getTotal

      public static BigDecimal getTotal(Account account)
      Calculates the total amount of the transaction for a given account by summing the totals of all InvestmentTransaction objects stored in that account's transaction list. If the account has no entries or none are investment transactions, BigDecimal.ZERO is returned.

    • getTotal

      public BigDecimal getTotal()
      Gets the total amount of this investment transaction calculated from quantity, price and fees.
